entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of PrettyGoodAI. Am I speaking with Marcus?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Yes, this is Marcus. I’d like to set up a new patient appointment for a general checkup next week, preferably in the morning.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Please say your date of birth. Please say your date of birth.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Sure. My date of birth is August 22, 1990.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Thanks, Marcus. How can I help you today?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I’d like to schedule a general checkup appointment for next week, if possible. Mornings would be best for me.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Let me check what's open next week. I did not find any openings next week. If you want, I can check a different week or see if any provider has something sooner.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I see, no problem. Could you check the following week for any morning slots?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Let me check the following week for morning openings. I do not see any morning openings that week. If you'd like, I can check another week or look at any time of day.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: All right, could you check for the soonest morning availability, even if it’s the week after that?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: One moment, I'll look for the soonest morning opening I can find. I still do not see a morning opening yet. I can keep checking for a later week, or I can hand this off for clinic follow-up if you want.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Let’s keep checking for a later week, maybe two or three weeks out. I’d really prefer a morning slot if possible.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Let me check three weeks out for a morning opening.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: We have openings on Tuesday, July 14th, with Dr. Doogie Houser. The earliest morning slot is 10:30 a.m. Would you like me to book that one?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Yes, that works for me. Please go ahead and book the 10:30 a.m. slot on July 14th.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Your appointment is booked for Tuesday, July 14th at 10:30 a.m. Please bring your government-issued photo ID and insurance card. Also bring a list of your current medications and any imaging discs if you have them.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Thank you, I’ve got it. I’ll bring those items along. I appreciate your help.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: You're all set! Have a good day!
